series_metadata.series_title: Licensed Residential Facility Transfer and Discharge Appeals
series_metadata.series_description: Files pertaining to appeals under Ohio Ohio Adm. Code 5123-3-05 pertaining the admission, transfer or discharge of residents from licensed residential facilities.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain for six years after closure of case., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
